programme.title: The Good Neighbour
programme.desc: The Good Neighbour is a docuseries that explores the complexities of poverty and challenges viewers to think about what it means to be a 'good neighbour.'.

programme.title: Hour of Power
programme.desc: Bobby Schuller provides principles and practices that can help people become happy students of Jesus and live a life of meaning believing there is no fuller, richer life than the one that is lived in Christ.

programme.title: Life with Paul De Jong
programme.desc: We like to call it 'soul food'. This program uses creative illustration, real life stories and biblical teaching to encourage and help viewers discover a greater purpose to their lives.

programme.title: Answers with Bayless Conley
programme.desc: In his special Mother's Day message, The Woman at the Well, Pastor Bayless explores this life-changing moment in John chapter 4, revealing the compassion and grace Jesus offered to a broken woman.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Where do you find your worth? Joyce, Ginger, Erin, and guest Laney Rene discuss how to rest in God's love and see yourself the way He does, not defined by the world.

programme.title: Songs of Praise
programme.desc: Join us for a musical celebration of life and faith as Songs of Praise travels throughout Britain and the world presenting soul stirring hymns and touching stories of inspiration.

programme.title: Moms' Night Out
programme.desc: All Allyson and her friends want is a long-needed mums' night out. But in order to enjoy high heels, adult conversation and food not served in a paper bag, they need their husbands to watch the kids for three hours.

programme.title: It Takes a Child
programme.desc: A former sponsor child explores a village in Samar, Philippines that has been impacted by child sponsorship. For many families here, poverty has ripped away their options; but Compassion sponsorship is showing a way out.

programme.title: Praise, Prayer and Preaching
programme.desc: Be part of the weekly service with Rev Keith Garner as he shares with his congregation a message from the bible.

programme.title: Woodlawn
programme.desc: It's 1973, and a high school footballer in a newly desegregated school battles racial tensions on and off the field.

programme.title: Mean Girls (2024)
programme.desc: In a musical twist of the cult classic, new student Cady Heron is welcomed by the popular girls called The Plastics. However, Cady falls for queen bee Regina's ex-boyfriend.

programme.title: A Different Man
programme.desc: An aspiring actor undergoes a radical medical procedure to transform his appearance. However, his dream face quickly becomes a nightmare as he becomes obsessed with reclaiming what he lost.

programme.title: Rock Hudson: All The Heaven Allowed
programme.desc: Archival footage and interviews with close friends provide insight into the life and career of Hollywood icon Rock Hudson.

programme.title: It Ends with Us
programme.desc: Lily overcomes a traumatic childhood to embark on a new life. A meeting with a neurosurgeon sparks a connection but Lily begins to see sides of him that remind her of her parents' relationship.

programme.title: Cassino in Ischia
programme.desc: Nic Cassino goes to Italy to work with struggling Italian directors on the first-ever "Neo-Realist" action movie in an effort to revitalize his career.

programme.title: Firebrand
programme.desc: Katherine Parr, Henry VIII's sixth wife, becomes regent while he battles abroad. When he returns sick and paranoid, she must fight for her survival.

programme.title: Wonka
programme.desc: A young Willy Wonka, chock-full of ideas and determined to change the world one bite at a time, proves that the best things in life begin with a dream.

programme.title: Greatest Days
programme.desc: A feature adaption of "The Band" musical, featuring songs of Take That.

programme.title: Two Tickets to Greece
programme.desc: France. When childhood friends Magalie and Blandine cross paths after many years, they decide to finally take their dream vacation to Greece.

programme.title: Drive-Away Dolls
programme.desc: Free-spirited Jamie and her demure friend, Marian, embark on a road trip to Tallahassee for a fresh start, but things go wrong when they meet inept criminals along the way.

programme.title: The Heist Before Christmas
programme.desc: A Christmas-hating boy meets two Santas in the woods, one of whom claims to have fallen from his sleigh, but he is more interested in the other man when he learns he is on the run for robbing a bank.

programme.title: Christmas Eve in Miller's Point
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, a family gathers for what may be their last holiday in their ancestral home. As tensions rise, a teen sneaks out with friends to take over the wintry suburb for herself.

programme.title: Gary
programme.desc: Follows Gary Coleman's rise to international fame as the child star of Diff'rent Strokes, his struggles with fame, and the controversy surrounding his tragic death at the age of 42.

programme.title: E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial
programme.desc: An extraterrestrial finds a friend in 10-year-old Elliot, while members of a task force work day and night to track down the whereabouts of Earth's first visitor from outer space.

programme.title: Forrest Gump
programme.desc: One man will rise above his challenges and prove that determination, courage, and love are more important than ability.

programme.title: The Addams Family (1991)
programme.desc: A swindler claiming to be their long-lost Uncle Fester tries to steal a fortune from the kooky and spooky Addams family.

programme.title: Mamma Mia!
programme.desc: Sophie has just one wish to make her wedding perfect: to have her father walk her down the aisle. Now she just has to find out who he is.

programme.title: Mamma Mia! Here We Go Again
programme.desc: A decade after Mamma Mia! sang and danced its way into the hearts of audiences around the world, the original cast are back.

programme.title: Bridesmaids
programme.desc: Annie's life is a mess. But when she finds out her lifelong best friend is engaged, she simply must serve as Lillian's maid of honour.

programme.title: Look Who's Talking Too
programme.desc: In this sequel, Mikey, a wise-cracking toddler, meets his match when an unwelcome baby sister arrives.

programme.title: It's Complicated
programme.desc: With a thriving bakery, a new romance and her divorce finally behind her, Jane Adler has her life all figured out, until her ex-husband Jake decides he'll stop at nothing to win her back.

programme.title: Meet the Fockers
programme.desc: Domestic disaster looms for nurse Greg Focker when his straight-laced, ex-CIA father-in-law, Jack Byrnes, asks to meet his parents before the wedding.

programme.title: Crazy Rich Asians
programme.desc: Native New Yorker Rachel accompanies her long-time boyfriend Nick to his friend's wedding in Singapore. But she's unprepared to learn a few key details about his life.

programme.title: Maid in Manhattan
programme.desc: An affluent politician falls for a gorgeous housemaid, thinking she's a guest at the flash hotel where she works, in this rags-to-riches update of the Cinderella story.

programme.title: Mean Girls
programme.desc: A home-schooled newcomer is introduced to the blackboard jungle, where she joins the social outcasts in a planned sabotage of the cool kids.

programme.title: She's Having a Baby
programme.desc: A couple face the terrors of adulthood, from interfering in-laws and career crises to overextended credit and maintaining a house, but are they up to the perils of impending parenthood?

programme.title: Dear Evan Hansen
programme.desc: In this film adaptation of the Broadway phenomenon, Evan Hansen is an anxious, isolated high-schooler who aches for understanding and belonging amid the chaos and cruelty of the social media age.

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon
programme.desc: Set in the mythical world of burly Vikings and fire-breathing dragons, a Viking teenager takes in an injured dragon and sees an opportunity to set his tribe on a new course.

programme.title: Oink
programme.desc: A nine-year-old girl gets a pig named Oink as a gift from her grandfather.

programme.title: Transformers One
programme.desc: The untold origin story of Optimus Prime and Megatron, better known as sworn enemies, but who once were friends bonded like brothers.

programme.title: Bumblebee
programme.desc: Cybertron has fallen. When Optimus Prime sends Bumblebee to protect Earth, he begins his journey to become the hero the universe needs.

programme.title: The Tiger's Apprentice
programme.desc: Tom Lee discovers he is part of a long lineage of magical protectors known as the Guardians. With guidance from a mythical tiger named Hu, Tom trains to take on an evil force that threatens humanity.

programme.title: Dora's World Adventure
programme.desc: Everyone's celebrating Friendship Day! But when Swiper mistakenly swipes all the special glowing Friendship Bracelets, Dora needs to team up with him to bring them back to the Friendship Parades.

programme.title: The Boss Baby: Family Business
programme.desc: Boss Baby continues to navigate the cutthroat corporate jungle gym of Baby Corp, while angling to achieve the near-impossible: the work-life balance of a modern career baby.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 4
programme.desc: After three death-defying adventures, Po, the Dragon Warrior is called upon by destiny to become the spiritual leader of the Valley of Peace.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit 2: The Runaway
programme.desc: Adventuring outside, Peter finds himself in a world where his mischief is appreciated, but when his family risks everything to come looking for him, he must figure out what kind of bunny he wants to be.

programme.title: Trolls Band Together
programme.desc: Join Poppy and Branch on their latest adventure as they embark on an epic journey that lead to Branch's reunion with his BroZone brothers, and Poppy's long-lost sister, Viva.

programme.title: Puss in Boots
programme.desc: After Puss in Boots was blamed for a bank robbery in San Ricardo, engineered against his wishes by Humpty Dumpty, Puss leaves Humpty to his fate. Now reunited, they try to trust each other again.

programme.title: The Angry Birds Movie 2
programme.desc: To save their islands, the flightless angry birds and the scheming green piggies take their beef to the next level.

programme.title: Despicable Me 3
programme.desc: Everyone's favourite reformed super-villain Gru returns for more adventures with Lucy, their daughters, and the lovably zany minions.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! The Movie

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 4
programme.desc: After three death-defying adventures, Po, the Dragon Warrior is called upon by destiny to become the spiritual leader of the Valley of Peace.

programme.title: Chappie
programme.desc: When one police droid, Chappie, is stolen and given new programming, he becomes the first robot with the ability to think and feel for himself.

programme.title: Man of Steel
programme.desc: A man learns that he has extraordinary powers and is not of this Earth. But the hero in him must emerge if he is to save the world from annihilation and become the symbol of hope for all mankind.

programme.title: Transformers: Revenge of the Fallen
programme.desc: When college-bound Sam Witwicky learns the truth about the ancient origins of the Transformers, he must accept his destiny and join Optimus Prime and Bumblebee in their epic battle.

programme.title: Geostorm
programme.desc: A system of satellites designed to protect the earth from natural disasters starts to malfunction, but who is responsible and can it be stopped?

programme.title: Snakes on a Plane
programme.desc: FBI agent Flynn has to transport a witness, but as the plane reaches 30,000 feet, hundreds of deadly snakes are released, causing violent mayhem.

programme.title: Men in Black II
programme.desc: J and K return as the secretive agents who 'out' aliens. When a dangerous one lands, disguised as an irresistible model, they have to save humanity once again.

programme.title: The Shallows
programme.desc: When a surfer is attacked by a great white shark 20 yards from shore, her short journey back to safety becomes the ultimate contest of wills.

programme.title: Aquaman
programme.desc: The origin story of half-human, half-Atlantean Arthur Curry takes him on the journey of his lifetime - to discover whether he is worthy of who he was born to be: a king.

programme.title: Jack Reacher
programme.desc: A military cop becomes involved in a deadly game of cat-and-mouse when five people are randomly murdered by a sniper.

programme.title: Godzilla vs. Kong
programme.desc: Fearsome monsters Godzilla and King Kong square off in an epic battle for the ages, while humanity looks to wipe out both of the creatures and take back the planet once and for all.

programme.title: The Conjuring
programme.desc: This is the true story of Ed and Lorraine Warren, world renowned paranormal investigators, who were called to help a family terrorised by a dark presence in a secluded farmhouse.

programme.title: Evil Dead
programme.desc: Five friends head to a remote cabin where they discover the Book of the Dead, and they unwittingly summon up demons living in the nearby woods.

programme.title: Carrie
programme.desc: A shy girl outcast by her peers and sheltered by her deeply religious mother unleashes telekinetic terror on her small town after being pushed too far.

programme.title: Escape Room: Tournament of Champions
programme.desc: Six strangers unwittingly find themselves locked in a maze of deadly rooms. Joining forces with two of the original survivors, they soon discover they've all played the game before.

programme.title: I Love You, Man
programme.desc: Upon realising that he has no male friends close enough to serve as his best man, a husband-to-be immediately embarks on a series of bizarre and awkward man-dates to find such a friend.

programme.title: Happy Gilmore
programme.desc: Happy doesn't just play golf, he destroys it. With the help of a retired golfer and hot publicist, can Happy perfect his game and tame his temper to win the tournament prize money?

programme.title: Old School
programme.desc: Three friends try to recapture their glory days by opening up a fraternity much to the ire of Pritchard, a dean at the college who was the target of their abuse when they were all students.

programme.title: A Very Harold & Kumar Christmas
programme.desc: Following years of growing apart, Harold and Kumar embark on another ill-advised journey through NYC, where their search takes them through party heaven, and almost blows Christmas Eve sky-high.

programme.title: The Hangover
programme.desc: When three friends wake up in a trashed Las Vegas hotel room after a bachelor party, they realise the groom is missing and must piece together the night's events - one hazy clue at a time.

programme.title: American Pie
programme.desc: Four unlucky in love friends who make a pact: lose their virginity by prom night. Manipulating their way into the hearts of some of their classmates, their plans often backfire with hilarity.

programme.title: Billy Madison
programme.desc: A 27-year-old spoiled brat must repeat all 12 grades of school - in just 24 weeks - to earn his father's respect and prove he can run the family's multimillion-dollar empire.

programme.title: Little Nicky
programme.desc: When Satan refuses to retire, two of his heirs leave Hell for New York City to gather enough souls to vote the Prince of Darkness out of office.

programme.title: Paul Blart: Mall Cop
programme.desc: When Santa's helpers at the mall stage a coup, closing the megaplex and taking hostages, Paul Blart leaps to the rescue. No longer just a mall guard, he becomes like a real cop to save the day.

programme.title: Mr. Bean's Holiday
programme.desc: Mr Bean can't believe his luck when he wins a camcorder and an all-expense paid holiday to the French Riviera. But during his journey to the south, he falls face first into a series of mishaps.

programme.title: The War With Grandpa
programme.desc: When grandfather Ed moves in, Peter is forced to give up his bedroom. Unwilling to tolerate this injustice, Peter devises a series of pranks to drive him out.

programme.title: Talladega Nights
programme.desc: Racing sensation Ricky Bobby is a hero because of his "win at all costs" approach. When a French driver challenges him for the supremacy of NASCAR, Ricky must face his own demons.

programme.title: Scary Movie
programme.desc: In this send-up of the most popular horror movies, a familiar-looking group of teenagers find themselves being stalked by a more-than-vaguely recognisable masked killer.

programme.title: Benchwarmers 2: Breaking Balls
programme.desc: After his big league dreams are crushed, Ben McGrath is reluctant to take another swing at redemption for his boss' law firm softball team.

programme.title: Billy Madison
programme.desc: A 27-year-old spoiled brat must repeat all 12 grades of school - in just 24 weeks - to earn his father's respect and prove he can run the family's multimillion-dollar empire.

programme.title: Paul Blart: Mall Cop
programme.desc: When Santa's helpers at the mall stage a coup, closing the megaplex and taking hostages, Paul Blart leaps to the rescue. No longer just a mall guard, he becomes like a real cop to save the day.

programme.title: Kate & Leopold
programme.desc: Romance ignites when a rip in time entwines a 19th century bachelor and a 21st century woman. The star-crossed lovers discover that passion and chivalry never go out of style.

programme.title: My Big Fat Greek Wedding 2
programme.desc: A Portokalos family secret brings the beloved characters back together for an even bigger and Greeker wedding.

programme.title: The Boy Next Door
programme.desc: A newly separated teacher gives in to temptation when the handsome teenager next door attempts to seduce her. But trouble ensues when she tries to end the relationship.

programme.title: Last Christmas
programme.desc: Featuring the music of George Michael, this film follows a hapless Londoner who works in a Christmas shop and becomes involved with a man who could be the answer to her problems.

programme.title: Love Actually
programme.desc: Love's causing chaos all over London. Even the PM is smitten. Ten separate stories intertwine in a Christmas Eve climax.

programme.title: Monster-In-Law
programme.desc: Charlotte finally finds the man of her dreams only to discover that his mother is the woman of her nightmares.

programme.title: The Bodyguard
programme.desc: A bodyguard is sent to protect a pop-music diva from a homicidal fan. At first repelled by each other, passion ignites as danger explodes around them.

programme.title: The First Wives Club
programme.desc: This is a sinfully satisfying revenge romp that follows three women who are reunited by the death of a college friend, teaming up they embark on a mission to teach their cheating ex-husbands a lesson.

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Diary
programme.desc: A busy journalist embarks on a husband-seeking journey towards self-discovery with the help of two imperfect suitors.

programme.title: My Best Friend's Wedding
programme.desc: Jules realises she's in love with her best friend, who's about to marry someone else. She'll do anything to steal him away, except tell him the truth.

programme.title: Sleepless in Seattle
programme.desc: After a man pours out his love for his late wife on radio, a listener inexplicably decides that he is her destiny and treks across the USA to meet him.

programme.title: Stepmom
programme.desc: When tragedy strikes, two strong-willed and independent women must put aside their differences and resentments to unite a family in crisis.

programme.title: The Bodyguard
programme.desc: A bodyguard is sent to protect a pop-music diva from a homicidal fan. At first repelled by each other, passion ignites as danger explodes around them.

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Diary
programme.desc: A busy journalist embarks on a husband-seeking journey towards self-discovery with the help of two imperfect suitors.

programme.title: Minority Report
programme.desc: In the year 2054, the head of a police unit specialising in pre-crime - the arrest and conviction of murderers before they commit their crime - finds himself accused of a future murder.

programme.title: Se7en
programme.desc: Two cops track a brilliant and elusive killer who orchestrates a string of horrific murders.

programme.title: Jarhead
programme.desc: Follows Marine Swoff from a sobering stint in boot camp to active duty in the Middle East.

programme.title: Green Zone
programme.desc: Discovering covert and faulty intelligence causes a US Army officer to go rogue as he hunts for weapons of mass destruction in an unstable region.

programme.title: The Bourne Identity
programme.desc: Pulled from the sea, Jason Bourne discovers he has the skills of a very dangerous man and no memory of his past.

programme.title: A Beautiful Day In The Neighborhood
programme.desc: This timely true story of kindness triumphing over cynicism is based on the real-life friendship between beloved TV host Fred Rogers and journalist Tom Junod.

programme.title: Oslo
programme.desc: Adapted from the Tony Award-winning play of the same name, this film is based on a true story of negotiations between implacable enemies that led to the 1993 Oslo Peace Accords.

programme.title: Ordinary Angels
programme.desc: A struggling hairdresser finds a renewed sense of purpose when she meets a widowed father and his two daughters.

programme.title: Bastille Day
programme.desc: When a reckless CIA agent and a brilliant pickpocket uncover a large-scale conspiracy, they must work together in order to take down a common enemy.

programme.title: Once Upon A Time... In Hollywood
programme.desc: In 1969 Los Angeles, during the Charles Manson murders, a TV actor and his stunt double embark on an odyssey to make a name for themselves in the film industry.

programme.title: The Perfect Storm
programme.desc: Based on a terrifyingly true and tragic story, a fishing crew sail into a disastrous storm when three hurricanes merge, creating mountainous waves.

programme.title: A Beautiful Day In The Neighborhood
programme.desc: This timely true story of kindness triumphing over cynicism is based on the real-life friendship between beloved TV host Fred Rogers and journalist Tom Junod.

programme.title: Oslo

programme.title: Patriot Games
programme.desc: With his CIA days behind him, Jack Ryan is on vacation when he foils an assassination attempt on the royal family. An enraged IRA splinter faction targets him and his family in revenge.

programme.title: U.S. Marshals
programme.desc: Marshal Gerard leads the hunt by initiating a hard-target search for a fugitive in an ever-widening perimeter. This film is packed with suspense, action and daring twists.

programme.title: The Naked Gun
programme.desc: Incompetent detective Frank Drebin has to foil an attempt to assassinate the Queen as he woos Priscilla Presley.

programme.title: Hard Target
programme.desc: Wealthy hunters pay for the right to stalk and kill the most challenging prey of them all: man.

programme.title: A Few Good Men
programme.desc: A slick, young Navy lawyer is assigned to investigate a murder case in which two Marines killed a fellow enlisted man, and no one's talking.

programme.title: Memphis Belle
programme.desc: In 1943, the crew of a B-17 based in the UK prepares for its 25th and final bombing mission over Germany before returning home to the USA.

programme.title: Lawrence of Arabia
programme.desc: When TE Lawrence is attached to the British general staff in Arabia, he inspires the feuding Arabian chieftains to rebel against the Turks, leading to the birth of the Arabian kingdom.

programme.title: The Jackal
programme.desc: An FBI director works with a Russian agent and a jailed terrorist to hunt down the elusive Jackal, a master-of-disguise assassin on a deadly mission.

programme.title: The Replacement Killers
programme.desc: An assassin who in exchange for his family's safety in Beijing, takes a job with a powerful underworld figure to settle a deadly vendetta against a police officer.

programme.title: Lethal Weapon 2
programme.desc: Mismatched detective duo Riggs and Murtaugh are onto a gang using diplomatic immunity to traffic in cocaine.

programme.title: A Few Good Men

programme.desc: When TE Lawrence is attached to the British general staff in Arabia, he inspires the feuding Arabian chieftains to rebel against the Turks, leading to the birth of the Arabian kingdom.

programme.title: My Amish Double Life
programme.desc: Emma is a young Amish woman who leads a double life by sneaking out to clubs to flirt and have fun. However, when she accidentally witnesses a murder, her life and community get thrown into peril.

programme.title: Non-Stop
programme.desc: Having been jilted at the altar, a literary aide to a controversial author thinks nothing of a fleeting liaison with a man she meets on a business flight.

programme.title: A Deadly Threat to My Family
programme.desc: Marielle becomes suspicious when her sister-in-law escapes from a cult and seeks refuge at her home. When another cult member shows up on her doorstep, she fears her daughter is their next target.

programme.title: From Straight A's to XXX
programme.desc: Miriam Weeks, a freshman at Duke University, is looking to make money to cover tuition and becomes infamously known for starring in online pornography under the pseudonym Belle Knox.

programme.title: Lust: A Seven Deadly Sins Story
programme.desc: Tiffanie is about to have the wedding of her dreams to her soul mate Damon. But when Damon's old friend Trey arrives, fresh from prison, to be Damon's best man, Tiffanie's whole world is rocked.

programme.title: Who Is Killing The Cheerleaders?
programme.desc: Ellie, a former cheerleader, returns to her high school as a teacher 10 years after she was nearly killed in a series of brutal slayings on the squad.

programme.title: Abducted In The Everglades
programme.desc: A college student vanishes during spring break in Miami. Her mother, with help from a local boatman, braves dangers to urgently search for her and unravel the mystery.

programme.title: Ice Road Killer
programme.desc: Follows Helen and her daughter Lauren, who go on a trip to an isolated cabin in the cold north and meet a hitchhiker who actually is a thief trying to evade a cold-blooded killer.

programme.title: Waking Up To Danger
programme.desc: A young mother picks up the pieces after a horrible accident damages her memory. She soon suspects her husband's indiscretions are what caused her suffering and that her family is in danger.

programme.title: A Roommate to Die For
programme.desc: After a nasty break-up, Faith needs a new roommate to supplement the rent and finds that something very strange is going on with the tenant who decides to move in.

programme.title: There's a New Killer in Town
programme.desc: Alice is living a quiet life in a small town when she meets Ronnie. However, one of her friends starts to suspect that there's more to him than meets the eye.

programme.title: Mommy Meanest
programme.desc: A teenage girl is relentlessly cyber-bullied, only to find out the horrific texts are from her own mother.

programme.title: Nightmare School Moms
programme.desc: Two mothers battle to see which of their overachieving daughters will be accepted to a prestigious university. However, when one of their methods quickly spirals out of control, the games turn deadly.

programme.desc: The inspiring true love story of Robin and Diana Cavendish, an adventurous couple who refuse to give up in the face of a devastating disease.

programme.title: When My Coffee Reaches Someone
programme.desc: A small cafe in the city of Kumamoto. From across Japan, people dealing with the death of a loved one are drawn to this special spot. A story of loss and renewal that begins with a cup of coffee.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Darwin's Amazing Animals
programme.desc: The Tama River runs through Tokyo. It's home to Ayu, the queen of freshwater streams. Every year 10 million of them go upstream to spawn. But many invasive species are intruding on their oasis now.

programme.title: Time-lapse Journey
programme.desc: The Amakusa region has over 120 islands and is home to one of the places where a unique form of Christianity developed. See Amakusa's historic sights and natural beauty through time-lapse photography.

programme.desc: This show for kids promotes a greater understanding for people with difficulties and helps develop empathy. With the help of two fairies, the main character thinks about what can be done to help.

programme.title: Texico
programme.desc: Learn the principles of programming without a computer. Animated characters provide fun and lucid explanations of 5 core processes: analysis, combination, generalization, abstraction, and simulation.

programme.desc: Journey through valleys in northern Kyoto Pref. and admire grand spectacular the Sea of Japan. We ride attractive trains, learn about the culture and history, and visit places that appear in legends.

programme.title: Japanology Plus Mini
programme.desc: For hundreds of years, Japanese people have used name stamps, known as hanko, to sign their name. In a 5-minute digest, we discover their history and explore what a hanko-free future might look like.

programme.title: Spiritual Explorers
programme.desc: Japan lies in a volcanic zone and boasts over 3000 onsen. We visit two old hot springs to learn the significance of bathing to the Japanese spirit.

programme.title: Japan from Above
programme.desc: This program takes you on an aerial journey across 21st century Japan. Enjoy the bird's-eye view of unique landscapes as well as intimate portraits of the people who inhabit the archipelago.

programme.title: BOSAI: Science that Can Save Your Life
programme.desc: In 2021, digital twin technology analyzed a landslide in Atami and prevented further disasters. Find out how it is also used for tsunami prediction.

programme.title: Hand-making the Scenery of Life
programme.desc: Yamagata / Minagawa Akira (designer) To make a "dantsu" carpet, everything from yarn-making to weaving is done by hand. Minagawa experiences the deep allure of handmade goods.

programme.title: Woodlawn
programme.desc: It's 1973, and a high school footballer in a newly desegregated school battles racial tensions on and off the field.

programme.title: New Creation Church

programme.title: Bible Man
programme.sub-title: Getting Right Wrecks the Ronin of Wrong

programme.title: Sea Kids
programme.desc: The Sea Kids will help transform the heart and mind of every child as they learn how to tangibly live out biblical principles and build a strong foundation in Jesus.

programme.title: Ryan Defrates: Secret Agent
programme.desc: Ryan Defrates is a young spy with a whole lot to learn. One day he's paired with a very unlikely partner - his mum!

programme.title: PowerPoint with Jack Graham
programme.sub-title: Facing the Future with Courageous Joy
programme.desc: A vision of Dr Jack Graham to glorify God by introducing Jesus Christ as Lord to as many people as possible and to develop them in Christian living.

programme.title: Kindness Diaries
programme.desc: Adventurer Leon Logothetis travels from Alaska to Argentina relying on the kindness of strangers and surprising unsuspecting good Samaritans with life-changing gifts!

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: Elizabeth turns over a new leaf as Hope Valley confronts a shocking event. Nathan returns home from an investigation, and Bill questions its outcome. Rosemary chases a scoop. Lucas makes a surprise announcement.

programme.title: A Very Tall Man
programme.desc: Gary Hoogvliet, a very tall man, interviews interesting folk, not quite as tall as he, but nevertheless with fascinating and inspiring stories to tell.

programme.title: LIFE Church - Online
programme.desc: Join Senior Pastors Paul and Maree de Jong along with the LIFE Team for their Sunday service experience, pre-recorded from their Central Campus in Auckland, New Zealand.

programme.title: Day of Discovery
programme.sub-title: The Six Miracles of Calvary Pt3
programme.desc: Increase your awe for God, His power, and His unfailing love through this historical and reflective view of the miracles surrounding the death and resurrection of Christ. Part 3.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: When fear tries to rob you of the good things God has for you, learn how to face your fears head-on and "do it afraid."

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church for a session of powerful music and empowering preaching.

programme.title: Songs of Praise
programme.desc: Join us for a musical celebration of life and faith as Songs of Praise travels throughout Britain and the world presenting soul stirring hymns and touching stories of inspiration.

programme.title: Moms' Night Out
programme.desc: All Allyson and her friends want is a long-needed mums' night out. But in order to enjoy high heels, adult conversation and food not served in a paper bag, they need their husbands to watch the kids for three hours.

programme.title: Beyond the Fire: Resilience
programme.desc: This program takes an honest look at the frustrations and triumphs on the road to recovery three years after the Black Summer bushfire crisis.

programme.title: Kids Beach Club
programme.desc: Join the Beach Club Kids as they navigate life, explore character lessons, and have a blast playing memorable games while discovering God through the pages of His Word, the Bible.

programme.title: Torchlighters: Heroes of the Faith
programme.desc: With the help of some fishermen hungry for truth, Robert Jermain Thomas risks everything to smuggle in a treasure beyond all imagination.

programme.title: Ancestors: Old Testament

programme.title: The Catholic Guy
programme.sub-title: Living Life to the Full Part 2
programme.desc: Bruce Downes is the Catholic Guy. His presentations will uplift, inform and challenge you to move to higher level of faith and life. He will leave you knowing where you want to go and what to do next.

programme.title: The Incredible Journey
programme.desc: Gary Kent is passionate about sharing the good news of Christ and preparing people for the soon coming of Jesus, offering Biblical answers to life's questions.

programme.title: Helping Hands
programme.desc: This inspiring and uplifting program facilitates conversations to empower viewers to make a positive impact in their own circles of influence.

programme.title: Caribbean Summer
programme.desc: After an embarrassing event during a live broadcast, Jade is forced to take a vacation, but her trip gets off to a rocky start when she fall's victim to a rental scam.

programme.title: Vindication
programme.desc: An episodic crime drama that follows the investigative work of Detective Gary Travis. New characters, new crimes, hard-hitting issues, spiritual revelations, surprising new romances and shocking new rivalries.

programme.title: A Moment in History
programme.desc: Join host Seth Udinski as he explores the most pivotal moments in history and the Bible, providing insight into the events that have shaped our world.

programme.title: New Horizons
programme.sub-title: Following Jesus in John's Gospel Pt2
programme.desc: A six week series exploring the somewhat unique perspective of following Jesus found in John's Gospel.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: The Promise Of Protection_Truths From Psalm 91 Pt 4 of 4
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches dynamic messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God.

programme.title: Bible Discovery TV
programme.desc: Hosted by the Hembree family, this is a daily devotional show where Rod, Janice, Ryan and Corie walk you through the Word in a way that will forever change how you read, learn and experience the Bible.

programme.title: Elevation Experience
programme.desc: The Elevation Experience with Pastor Steven Furtick features inspirational messages from Pastor Steven as well as original worship music from Elevation Church in Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: When fear tries to rob you of the good things God has for you, learn how to face your fears head-on and "do it afraid."

programme.title: Caribbean Summer
programme.desc: After an embarrassing event during a live broadcast, Jade is forced to take a vacation, but her trip gets off to a rocky start when she fall's victim to a rental scam.

programme.title: Autumn Stables
programme.desc: Recently widowed Autumn determined to start fresh, decides to sell her horse ranch to a seemingly trustworthy buyer, Jake.

programme.title: 90 Minutes In Heaven
programme.desc: A man involved in a horrific car crash is pronounced dead, only to come back to life an hour and a half later, claiming to have seen Heaven.

programme.title: Gary
programme.desc: Follows Gary Coleman's rise to international fame as the child star of Diff'rent Strokes, his struggles with fame, and the controversy surrounding his tragic death at the age of 42.

programme.title: AfrAId
programme.desc: The Curtis family tests a new digital assistant, AIA, which learns their behaviours and anticipates needs. But AIA's protective nature means nothing, or no one, will interfere with them.

programme.title: The Caine Mutiny Court-Martial
programme.desc: A naval officer stands trial for mutiny after taking command from a ship captain he feels is acting in an unstable way, putting in danger both the ship and its crew.

programme.title: Expend4bles
programme.desc: The Expendables are the world's last line of defence, and the team that is called when all other options are off the table.

programme.title: Venom: The Last Dance
programme.desc: Eddie Brock and Venom must make a devastating decision as they're pursued by a mysterious military man and alien monsters from Venom's home world.

programme.title: The Watchers
programme.desc: A 28-year-old artist gets stranded in an expansive, untouched forest in western Ireland. Finding shelter, she meets three strangers who are stalked by mysterious creatures every night.

programme.title: The Three Musketeers - Part II: Milady
programme.desc: Constance Bonacieux is kidnapped before D'Artagnan's very eyes. The young musketeer, aided by Athos, Porthos and Aramis, is forced to join the mysterious Milady de Winter.

programme.title: Furiosa: A Mad Max Saga
programme.desc: The origin story of renegade warrior Furiosa before her encounter and teamup with Mad Max.

programme.title: Ghostbusters: Frozen Empire
programme.desc: The Spengler family team up with the original Ghostbusters to save the world from a second Ice Age.

programme.title: Dune: Part Two
programme.desc: Paul unites with Chani and the Fremen to seek revenge. Facing a choice between the love of his life and the fate of the universe, he must prevent a terrible future only he can foresee.

programme.title: I Saw the TV Glow
programme.desc: A classmate introduces teenage Owen to a mysterious late-night TV show - a vision of a supernatural world beneath their own. Owen's view of reality begins to crack.

programme.title: Longlegs
programme.desc: In pursuit of a serial killer, an FBI agent uncovers a series of occult clues that she must solve to end his terrifying killing spree.

programme.title: The Convert
programme.desc: A preacher's violent past is drawn into question and his faith tested as he becomes caught up in a bloody war between Maori tribes after arriving at a British settlement in the 1830s.

programme.title: Dear Evan Hansen
programme.desc: In this film adaptation of the Broadway phenomenon, Evan Hansen is an anxious, isolated high-schooler who aches for understanding and belonging amid the chaos and cruelty of the social media age.

programme.title: Instant Family
programme.desc: Pete and Ellie must learn the ropes of instant parenthood when they bring in three foster-children.

programme.title: Close Encounters of the Third Kind
programme.desc: After an encounter with UFOs, a line worker feels undeniably drawn to an isolated area in the wilderness where something spectacular is about to happen.

programme.title: E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial
programme.desc: An extraterrestrial finds a friend in 10-year-old Elliot, while members of a task force work day and night to track down the whereabouts of Earth's first visitor from outer space.

programme.title: Ferris Bueller's Day Off
programme.desc: Larger than life, and blessed with a magical sense of serendipity, Ferris Bueller is a model for all those who take themselves too seriously.

programme.title: The Flintstones
programme.desc: After an aptitude test mix-up, Fred Flintstone trades his job as Bronto-crane operator for a vice presidency. An evil executive then plots to use Fred as the fall guy in an embezzlement scheme.

programme.title: Look Who's Talking Now
programme.desc: In this third film in the series, the Urbiaccos are going to the dogs. The canines must stop barking at each other to save the marriage of fun-loving parents James and Mollie.

programme.title: My Big Fat Greek Wedding 2
programme.desc: A Portokalos family secret brings the beloved characters back together for an even bigger and Greeker wedding.

programme.title: Little Fockers
programme.desc: After 10 years and two little Fockers, Greg returns and is still battling his father-in-law's suspicions. Will Greg pass Jack's final test and become the family's next patriarch?

programme.title: The Brady Bunch Movie
programme.desc: America's grooviest family are back in this big-screen adaptation of the long-running television series. The Bradys must save their home from foreclosure after a tax delinquency notice.

programme.title: This Is Where I Leave You
programme.desc: When their father dies, four grown siblings, bruised and banged up by their respective adult lives, are forced to return to their childhood home and live under the same roof together for a week.

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Baby
programme.desc: In this third instalment, Bridget's single life and career is interrupted when she finds herself pregnant and unable to identify her baby's father.

programme.title: Willy Wonka & the Chocolate Factory
programme.desc: Touring an incredible, edible realm of chocolate waterfalls, Oompa-Loompas and industrial-sized confections, a boy named Charlie will discover the sweetest secret of all: a generous, loving heart.

programme.title: Downton Abbey
programme.desc: After six unforgettable seasons, the global phenomenon heads to the big screen for the next chapter of the Crawley family saga.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 4
programme.desc: After three death-defying adventures, Po, the Dragon Warrior is called upon by destiny to become the spiritual leader of the Valley of Peace.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit 2: The Runaway
programme.desc: Adventuring outside, Peter finds himself in a world where his mischief is appreciated, but when his family risks everything to come looking for him, he must figure out what kind of bunny he wants to be.

programme.title: Dora's Christmas Carol Adventure
programme.desc: Santa has warned Swiper again and again. If he keeps swiping on Christmas, he'll be permanently put on the naughty list. Will the Christmas tree star and party be ruined?

programme.title: Nanny McPhee & The Big Bang
programme.desc: Nanny McPhee helps a stressed young mother trying to run the family farm while her husband is away at war.

programme.title: The Angry Birds Movie 2
programme.desc: To save their islands, the flightless angry birds and the scheming green piggies take their beef to the next level.

programme.title: Despicable Me 3
programme.desc: Everyone's favourite reformed super-villain Gru returns for more adventures with Lucy, their daughters, and the lovably zany minions.

programme.title: Spirit: Stallion of the Cimarron
programme.desc: Spirit is a wild and rambunctious stallion who travels across the frontiers of the Old West; where he befriends a young human and finds true love with a mare.

programme.title: Dora's Birthday Adventure
programme.desc: Dora and Boots need to get home for Dora's birthday party. But before they can jump out of the Magic Storybook, a wind blows them into Wizzle World.

programme.title: Detective Pikachu
programme.desc: Ace detective Harry Goodman goes missing, prompting his son Tim to find out what happened. Aiding the investigation is Harry's former Pokemon partner, Detective Pikachu.

programme.title: Daddy Day Care
programme.desc: Two men get laid off and have to become stay-at-home dads when they can't find jobs. This inspires them to open their own day-care centre.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania 2
programme.desc: Worried that his half-vampire grandson isn't showing signs of being a vampire, Dracula enlists his friends to put him through 'monster-in-training' boot camp.

programme.title: Sing
programme.desc: A dapper koala who has fallen on hard times has one final chance to restore his crumbling theatre by producing the world's greatest singing competition.

programme.title: Under The Boardwalk
programme.desc: When timid Jersey crab Armen meets bold tourist sea crab Ramona, it causes tension in the community. But when the duo are swept away by a storm, they embark on an epic journey to find home.

programme.title: Pixels
programme.desc: When aliens discover video feeds of classic arcade games and misinterpret them as a declaration of war, they attack the Earth, using the video games as models for their assaults.

programme.title: Spirit: Stallion of the Cimarron
programme.desc: Spirit is a wild and rambunctious stallion who travels across the frontiers of the Old West; where he befriends a young human and finds true love with a mare.

programme.title: Dora's Birthday Adventure
programme.desc: Dora and Boots need to get home for Dora's birthday party. But before they can jump out of the Magic Storybook, a wind blows them into Wizzle World.

programme.title: Detective Pikachu
programme.desc: Ace detective Harry Goodman goes missing, prompting his son Tim to find out what happened. Aiding the investigation is Harry's former Pokemon partner, Detective Pikachu.

programme.title: Escape Room: Tournament of Champions
programme.desc: Six strangers unwittingly find themselves locked in a maze of deadly rooms. Joining forces with two of the original survivors, they soon discover they've all played the game before.

programme.title: Jack Ryan: Shadow Recruit
programme.desc: When Ryan believes he's uncovered a Russian terrorist plot to collapse the United States economy, he goes from being an analyst to a spy, fighting to save his own life and those of countless others.

programme.title: Pacific Rim: Uprising
programme.desc: Jake, a once-promising Jaeger pilot, has given up his training only to be caught up in a criminal underworld. He's given one last chance when an unstoppable threat is unleashed.

programme.title: War Of The Worlds (2005)
programme.desc: Aliens have come to Earth in masses to destroy the planet. As they plough through the country in a wave of mass destruction and violence, a man must come to the defence of his estranged children.

programme.title: Fast & Furious 6
programme.desc: Hobbs has been tracking an organisation of lethally skilled drivers. The only way to stop the criminal mercenaries from stealing a top-secret weapon is to outmatch them at street level.

programme.title: Wonder Woman 1984
programme.desc: In the vibrant, sleek 1980s, Wonder Woman will have to muster all her strength, wisdom and courage as she finds herself squaring off against Maxwell Lord and the Cheetah.

programme.title: Alexander
programme.desc: The towering, true story of Alexander the Great, who, in the 4th century BC, conquered Greece, Persia, Afghanistan and India - 90 percent of the 'known world'.

programme.title: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: An experiment with dinosaurs created from DNA becomes a disaster when sabotage sets the prehistoric monsters loose in an island theme park.

programme.title: The Mummy (1999)
programme.desc: Archaeologists awaken an Egyptian priest mummified alive 36 centuries ago for killing Pharaoh Seti and sleeping with his mistress. When he escapes from the tomb, he becomes a threat to the world.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Homecoming
programme.desc: A young Peter Parker/Spider-Man begins to navigate his new-found identity as the web-slinging superhero.

programme.title: Jack Reacher: Never Go Back
programme.desc: When an Army Major is framed for treason, Reacher discovers she's the target of a massive government conspiracy and risks everything to take down the corrupt organisation.
This film is a ferocious retelling of the ancient Battle of Thermopylae, depicting the titanic clash in which King Leonidas and 300 Spartans fought Xerxes and his massive Persian army to the death.

programme.title: Paul Blart: Mall Cop
programme.desc: When Santa's helpers at the mall stage a coup, closing the megaplex and taking hostages, Paul Blart leaps to the rescue. No longer just a mall guard, he becomes like a real cop to save the day.

programme.title: Mr. Bean's Holiday
programme.desc: Mr Bean can't believe his luck when he wins a camcorder and an all-expense paid holiday to the French Riviera. But during his journey to the south, he falls face first into a series of mishaps.

programme.title: Beetlejuice
programme.desc: What's a couple of stay-at-home ghosts to do when their beloved home is taken over by yuppies? They call on Beetlejuice, the afterlife's freelance bio-exorcist, to scare off the family.

programme.title: Anchorman: The Legend of Ron Burgundy
programme.desc: When Ron Burgundy is told he will be working with a young, ambitious newswoman, it turns to war.

programme.title: Talladega Nights
programme.desc: Racing sensation Ricky Bobby is a hero because of his "win at all costs" approach. When a French driver challenges him for the supremacy of NASCAR, Ricky must face his own demons.

programme.title: Scary Movie
programme.desc: In this send-up of the most popular horror movies, a familiar-looking group of teenagers find themselves being stalked by a more-than-vaguely recognisable masked killer.

programme.title: Jack and Jill
programme.desc: Jack Sadelstein is a successful advertising executive with a beautiful wife and kids, who dreads the havoc that descends with the Thanksgiving visit of his twin sister, Jill.

programme.title: Liar Liar
programme.desc: A fast-talking lawyer and habitual liar discovers that he is unable to tell a lie or withhold the truth about anything for 24 hours after his son makes a birthday wish that comes true.

programme.title: Elf
programme.desc: Buddy, a human raised as an elf, is sent to the US in search of his true identity after nearly bringing Santa's operation to a catastrophic standstill due to his size.

programme.title: Mr. Deeds
programme.desc: Life flips over for a small-town pizzeria owner and poet who inherits $40 billion. Sleazy moguls come to whisk him and his money away to corporate America.

programme.title: Click
programme.desc: A harried workaholic who is given a universal remote that allows him to pause, rewind or skip portions of his life in this fast, and out-of-control comedy adventure.

programme.title: Ghostbusters: Afterlife
programme.desc: When a single mother and her two kids arrive in a small town, they begin to discover their connection to the original Ghostbusters and the secret legacy their grandfather left behind.

programme.title: The Cable Guy
programme.desc: A lonely, unhinged cable TV installer goes crazy as he forces his friendship on a lovelorn bachelor. A black comedy with pointed social commentary.

programme.title: Jack and Jill
programme.desc: Jack Sadelstein is a successful advertising executive with a beautiful wife and kids, who dreads the havoc that descends with the Thanksgiving visit of his twin sister, Jill.

programme.title: Zombieland
programme.desc: The most frightened guy on Earth leads a motley crew of survivors in a world overrun by zombies.

programme.title: Liar Liar

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Diary
programme.desc: A busy journalist embarks on a husband-seeking journey towards self-discovery with the help of two imperfect suitors.

programme.title: About a Boy
programme.desc: When a smooth-talking bachelor invents an imaginary son in order to meet attractive single mums, he gets a hilarious lesson about life from bright, but hopelessly geeky 12-year-old named Marcus.

programme.title: My Best Friend's Wedding
programme.desc: Jules realises she's in love with her best friend, who's about to marry someone else. She'll do anything to steal him away, except tell him the truth.

programme.desc: After a man pours out his love for his late wife on radio, a listener inexplicably decides that he is her destiny and treks across the USA to meet him.

programme.desc: After a terrible blind date, two single parents and their kids find themselves stuck together on an African wildlife holiday where things go from bad to worse.

programme.desc: Kitanoumi became the youngest ever yokozuna in 1974 and went on to dominate the ring for a decade. We revisit his career through NHK archive footage and newly recorded interviews.

programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Cycle Around Japan
programme.desc: This ride through Nara, site of Japan's ancient capital, takes us through historic locations bright with the colors of fall, a tranquil countryside brimming with the wisdom of the old days.

programme.title: Design Ah neo
programme.desc: Design is fun! Design feels good! Cutting-edge images and music guide children to enjoy exploring the ideas and tweaks in the designs all around us. An episode on Uniforms.

programme.title: Mitateru-phose
programme.desc: This program employs "mitateru," a Japanese technique, to inspire children's imagination by encouraging them to view objects differently and develop their unique perspectives and creativity.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: J-Melo
programme.desc: Join May J. for great Japanese music! Three former members of the pioneering J-fusion band CASIOPEA now play as the KATSUSHIKA TRIO. This week, they're in the J-MELO studio to chat and perform.

programme.title: Little Charo
programme.desc: Little Charo is an animation series about a Japanese dog who got lost in NY. "I want to see my owner again!" Charo starts his adventure back home. Season 1-6.

programme.title: Japanology Plus Mini
programme.desc: Goldfish in Japan range from beautiful to comical. A single ranchu - known as the "king of goldfish" - can cost millions of yen. In a 5-minute digest, we explore why they are so beloved.

programme.title: A Cat's-Eye View of Japan
programme.desc: In the Western-influenced port town of Kobe, a kitty seeks attention while its owner makes shoes at a custom shop. You'll meet a popular shopping district kitty that has its own designer T-shirt!

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Ramen Japan
programme.desc: This time in Wakayama, heartland of shoyu, we find a distinctive ramen culture pairing ramen and sushi?!

programme.title: Core Kyoto mini
programme.desc: Kyoto has many stores specializing in traditional snacks and treats, called Oyatsu. Some purveyors continue to use age-old ingredients and methods.

programme.title: Easy Japanese for Work
programme.desc: Accelerate your Japanese language skills! Learn practical, effective workplace expressions, understand business culture and improve your kanji.

programme.title: Zero Waste Life
programme.desc: Maro Kuratani knits scarves and other items with surplus yarn, using threads of varying color and thickness. She says yarn is the ultimate eco-friendly material as reknitting is always an option.

programme.title: NHK Newsline

programme.title: The World Heritage Sites in Japan
programme.desc: Mt. Fuji is Japan's tallest and most famous peak. It has long inspired awe and terror, and is a source of artistic inspiration. Join us to explore the iconic beauty of this famous mountain.

programme.title: Okinawa: Homes
programme.desc: Okinawa Prefecture is a group of subtropical islands in the far south of Japan. We examine its past and present, with footage from time-lapse creator Shimizu Daisuke. This time: Homes.

programme.title: Grand Sumo Highlights

programme.title: Sumopedia
programme.desc: Sumopedia enriches your sumo experience with information on the techniques, traditions and famous wrestlers of the past. The rules may be simple but there is a lot more to sumo than meets the eye.

programme.title: Chatroom Japan

programme.title: Direct Talk
programme.desc: Sekiguchi Itaru helped to restore the pipe organ at Notre Dame in Paris, following the cathedral's fire in 2019. He tells us about his work, including the tuning and voicing of these instruments.

programme.title: BOSAI: Science that Can Save Your Life

programme.title: Detective Pikachu
programme.desc: Ace detective Harry Goodman goes missing, prompting his son Tim to find out what happened. Aiding the investigation is Harry's former Pokemon partner, Detective Pikachu.

programme.desc: Two men get laid off and have to become stay-at-home dads when they can't find jobs. This inspires them to open their own day-care centre.

programme.title: Despicable Me 2

programme.desc: Heartbroken after the end of a relationship, a man falls for a new, advanced operating system - a bright, female voice, who is insightful and surprisingly funny.

programme.title: Friends with Benefits
programme.desc: Two best friends coming out of disastrous relationships, decide to make a 'friends with benefits' pact. However, soon they begin to fall in love and must re-evaluate their feelings for each other.

programme.title: Easy A
programme.desc: After a little white lie about losing her virginity gets out, a clean-cut high school girl decides to use the rumour mill to advance her social and financial standing.

programme.title: Mamma Mia! Here We Go Again
programme.desc: A decade after Mamma Mia! sang and danced its way into the hearts of audiences around the world, the original cast are back.

programme.title: Little Women
programme.desc: Draws on both the classic novel and the writings of Louisa May Alcott, and unfolds as the author's alter ego.

programme.title: Memoirs of a Geisha
programme.desc: A stunning adaptation of Arthur Golden's bestselling novel set in an exotic world tells the story of a servant who blossoms against all odds to become the most enchanting geisha of her day.

programme.title: I'll See You In My Dreams
programme.desc: With the support of three loyal girlfriends, Carol decides to embrace the world, pursue a new love interest and reconnect with her daughter.

programme.title: Vanity Fair
programme.desc: Adapted from the classic novel by William Makepeace Thackeray, growing up poor in London, Becky Sharp resolves to ascend the social ladder and conquer English society by any means possible.

programme.title: Bad Teacher
programme.desc: A foul-mouthed, ruthless and inappropriate teacher drinks, gets high and can't wait to marry a meal ticket to get out of her day job.

programme.title: Mamma Mia! Here We Go Again
programme.desc: A decade after Mamma Mia! sang and danced its way into the hearts of audiences around the world, the original cast are back.

programme.title: Little Women
programme.desc: Draws on both the classic novel and the writings of Louisa May Alcott, and unfolds as the author's alter ego.

programme.title: Split
programme.desc: Three girls are kidnapped by a man with 23 distinct personalities and they must try to escape before the next one emerges.

programme.title: The Da Vinci Code
programme.desc: A Harvard professor implicated in a murder must unravel an ancient code to expose the greatest conspiracy in history.

programme.title: Apollo 13
programme.desc: Houston, we have a problem - a fuel leak that threatens to doom three astronauts in space during NASA's 1970 moon mission.

programme.title: The Prestige
programme.desc: A mysterious story of two magicians whose intense rivalry leads them on a life-long battle for supremacy.

programme.title: The International
programme.desc: An Interpol Agent and Manhattan Assistant District Attorney are determined to bring to justice one of the world's most powerful banks.

programme.title: Elizabeth: The Golden Age
programme.desc: In late 16th century, Elizabeth finds her rule openly challenged by the Spanish King Philip II with his powerful army and sea-dominating armada determined to restore England to Catholicism.

programme.title: Voyagers
programme.desc: With the future of the human race at stake, a group of young men and women, bred for intelligence and obedience, embark on an expedition to colonise a distant planet.

programme.title: The Passenger
programme.desc: Randy is happy fading into the background. But when his co-worker Benson goes on a sudden violent rampage, Randy is forced to face his fears and confront his troubled past in order to survive.

programme.title: The Taking of Pelham 1 2 3
programme.desc: A New York City subway dispatcher's ordinary day is thrown into chaos by an audacious crime: the hijacking of a subway train buy a criminal mastermind.

programme.title: Get Out
programme.desc: A young African-American man becomes ensnared in a deadly trap when he meets his white girlfriend's parents at their cursed country estate.

programme.title: The Last Rifleman
programme.desc: World War II veteran Artie Crawford lives in Northern Ireland. After his wife's death, he decides to set off alone to France to attend the 75th anniversary of the D-Day landings.

programme.title: Elizabeth: The Golden Age

programme.title: Houseboat
programme.desc: A widowed man and his three children fall for an Italian woman who joins their floating home as housekeeper. He wins both their love and hers too.

programme.title: Groundhog Day
programme.desc: A self-centred TV weatherman is caught in a personal time warp, forced to relive one strange day over and over again. The jokes explode in this marvellously inventive and offbeat comedy.

programme.title: Lethal Weapon
programme.desc: A veteran cop gets a suicidal partner. They have one thing in common: they hate working in pairs. But if these two can stand each other, the bad guys don't stand a chance.

programme.title: The Dirty Dozen
programme.desc: Twelve American soldiers, all criminals, get a chance at redemption on a killing mission in World War II.

programme.title: Look Who's Talking Too
programme.desc: In this sequel, Mikey, a wise-cracking toddler, meets his match when an unwelcome baby sister arrives.

programme.title: Schindler's List
programme.desc: The true story of Nazi party member Oskar Schindler, who saved the lives of more than 1100 Jews during the Holocaust.

programme.title: Field of Dreams
programme.desc: After a voice tells a farmer to put a baseball diamond in his cornfield, the ghosts of famous players begin to appear on it.

programme.title: Dante's Peak
programme.desc: Without warning day becomes night, air turns to fire and the ground runs with molten terror. This is a spectacular volcano disaster movie with heart-pounding suspense.

programme.title: Lethal Weapon 2
programme.desc: Mismatched detective duo Riggs and Murtaugh are onto a gang using diplomatic immunity to traffic in cocaine.

programme.title: Tango & Cash
programme.desc: Two narcotics detectives can't stand each other. When a crime lord frames them for murder, they have to buddy up to clear their names and put him away.

programme.title: Look Who's Talking Too
programme.desc: In this sequel, Mikey, a wise-cracking toddler, meets his match when an unwelcome baby sister arrives.

programme.title: Schindler's List
programme.desc: The true story of Nazi party member Oskar Schindler, who saved the lives of more than 1100 Jews during the Holocaust.

programme.title: Your Boyfriend Is Mine
programme.desc: Over the objection of his girlfriend, Ben agrees to take a job as the live-in manservant to a wealthy businesswoman, Amanda, but quickly realises he has made a deal with the devil.

programme.title: V.C. Andrews' Gates Of Paradise
programme.desc: The car crash that killed Heaven and Logan left Annie Casteel Stonewall orphaned and crippled. Whisked off to Farthinggale Manor by the possessive Tony Tatterton, Annie pines for her lost family.

programme.title: Murder at the Country Club
programme.desc: An assistant manager finds her life in danger when she uncovers corrupt activities at a prestigious country club.

programme.title: Britney Ever After
programme.desc: The true story of Britney Jean Spears, one of the bestselling teenage music artists of all-time, whose dating life and public emotional breakdowns were the subjects of a worldwide media frenzy.

programme.title: An Amish Murder
programme.desc: A woman returns to the Amish farming community of her youth, but her peace is shattered when a murder investigation exposes a dark secret that could destroy her.

programme.title: Nightmare in the Desert
programme.desc: After returning to her childhood home, someone secretly tracks an outdoor enthusiast and her urbanite boyfriend through the desert.

programme.title: Girl in Room 13
programme.desc: Grace becomes addicted to opioids after suffering a sports injury. She's ready to leave her addiction behind under her mother's watch, but Richie kidnaps her to sell her into human trafficking.

programme.title: Killer Fortune Teller
programme.desc: Shane Settel starts to believe in fate after a chance tarot reading. He has the largest success in his professional career and falls in love, but then tragedies begin to follow him.

programme.title: If There Be Thorns
programme.desc: With Christopher and Cathy Dollanganger living together as man and wife, Cathy's two sons are unaware of the incestuous nature of their parents' relationship.

programme.title: Blonde and Blonder
programme.desc: When two dimwitted, blonde bombshells are mistaken for the underworld's most cunning assassins, they are approached with a lucrative contract to take out the head of the Chinese mafia.

programme.title: A Chef's Deadly Revenge
programme.desc: A woman moves to a new town and opens her own gourmet restaurant after escaping from an abusive relationship. However, she soon finds herself in a deadly game of cat and mouse.

programme.title: Greed: A Seven Deadly Sins Story
programme.desc: When interior decorator Zuri Maxwell meets a handsome benefactor and entrepreneur, she compromises the values and morals that should guide her, in an effort to be part of his world.

programme.title: Abducted In The Everglades
programme.desc: A college student vanishes during spring break in Miami. Her mother, with help from a local boatman, braves dangers to urgently search for her and unravel the mystery.

programme.desc: Telling the story of a vital national protest movement: Rock Against Racism, formed in 1976 when a group of artists united to take on the National Front.

programme.desc: A young African-American man becomes ensnared in a deadly trap when he meets his white girlfriend's parents at their cursed country estate.

programme.desc: World War II veteran Artie Crawford lives in Northern Ireland. After his wife's death, he decides to set off alone to France to attend the 75th anniversary of the D-Day landings.

programme.title: Everybody's Fine
programme.desc: A retired widower who has planned his first family get-together since his wife's death and is disappointed when his adult children all cancel on him, decides to pay a surprise visit.

programme.title: The Bone Collector
programme.desc: A bedridden detective teams up with a sharp rookie to catch a sadistic killer who leaves bizarre clues behind. As they close in they become his next targets.

programme.title: Cat Person
programme.desc: When Margot, a college sophomore, goes on a date with the older Robert, she finds that IRL Robert doesn't live up to the Robert she has been flirting with over texts.

programme.title: One Life
programme.desc: The incredible true story of British humanitarian Nicholas Winton, who helps save hundreds of Central European children from the Nazis on the eve of World War II.

programme.title: Forrest Gump
programme.desc: One man will rise above his challenges and prove that determination, courage, and love are more important than ability.

programme.title: Us
programme.desc: Adelaide, her husband Gabe, and their two children, are on a summer getaway that takes a nightmarish turn when they encounter terrifying doppelgangers of themselves.

programme.title: Miller's Girl
programme.desc: A creative writing assignment yields complex results between a teacher and his talented student.

programme.title: The Bone Collector
programme.desc: A bedridden detective teams up with a sharp rookie to catch a sadistic killer who leaves bizarre clues behind. As they close in they become his next targets.

programme.desc: When Margot, a college sophomore, goes on a date with the older Robert, she finds that IRL Robert doesn't live up to the Robert she has been flirting with over texts.

programme.desc: The incredible true story of British humanitarian Nicholas Winton, who helps save hundreds of Central European children from the Nazis on the eve of World War II.

programme.title: Schindler's List
programme.desc: The true story of Nazi party member Oskar Schindler, who saved the lives of more than 1100 Jews during the Holocaust.

programme.title: Field of Dreams
programme.desc: After a voice tells a farmer to put a baseball diamond in his cornfield, the ghosts of famous players begin to appear on it.

programme.title: Dante's Peak
programme.desc: Without warning day becomes night, air turns to fire and the ground runs with molten terror. This is a spectacular volcano disaster movie with heart-pounding suspense.

programme.title: Lethal Weapon 2
programme.desc: Mismatched detective duo Riggs and Murtaugh are onto a gang using diplomatic immunity to traffic in cocaine.

programme.title: Tango & Cash
programme.desc: Two narcotics detectives can't stand each other. When a crime lord frames them for murder, they have to buddy up to clear their names and put him away.

programme.title: Stand By Me
programme.desc: In this coming-of-age drama, a group of friends set out on an unforgettable two-day trek to find a missing teenager which turns in to an odyssey of self-discovery.

programme.title: Almost Famous
programme.desc: A coming-of-age story about an aspiring teenage writer who, ignoring the advice of his mother, goes on the road with an almost famous band in the '70s.

programme.title: Bird on a Wire
programme.desc: Hiding under the FBI witness protection program, a man gets nervous when an old flame recognises him. The two then find themselves thrown together on an exhilarating, cross-country odyssey.

programme.title: Last Action Hero
programme.desc: A magic movie ticket transports a young fan onto the screen with his action hero, but things blow up when a notorious movie villain uses the ticket to break into the real world.

programme.title: The Karate Kid (1984)
programme.desc: A new kid in town who is picked on by bullies learns karate and eastern philosophy from Mr Miyagi, and learns how to fight back.

programme.title: Sixteen Candles
programme.desc: Samantha's 16th birthday should be perfect and memorable. But her whole family is preoccupied with her sister's wedding and completely forgets Samantha's big day.

programme.title: Stand By Me
programme.desc: In this coming-of-age drama, a group of friends set out on an unforgettable two-day trek to find a missing teenager which turns in to an odyssey of self-discovery.

programme.desc: A coming-of-age story about an aspiring teenage writer who, ignoring the advice of his mother, goes on the road with an almost famous band in the '70s.

programme.title: Bird on a Wire
programme.desc: Hiding under the FBI witness protection program, a man gets nervous when an old flame recognises him. The two then find themselves thrown together on an exhilarating, cross-country odyssey.

programme.title: The Night Stalker
programme.desc: An attorney who lived in LA during the Night Stalker's murder spree attempts to clear the name of an inmate who she believes was wrongly accused of the crimes.

programme.title: Killer Vacation
programme.desc: Jake and his pregnant girlfriend, Lindsey, visit a resort, only to find his soon-to-be-ex there. As tensions rise, someone wants to ensure Lindsey never leaves.

programme.title: Silent Night, Fatal Night
programme.desc: When best-selling mystery author Mallory Dearborn decides to end her long-running detective franchise, her unhinged manager takes her prisoner and forces her to write a new novel during the holidays.

programme.title: No One Would Tell
programme.desc: Laura is happy for her daughter Sarah when she begins to date the popular boy from school, Rob. It is only a matter of time before Rob begins to reveal his darker, more possessive side.

programme.title: Love Triangle Nightmare
programme.desc: Brittany meets a stranger who has everything she wants in a partner and despite being an unknown man as warned by others, she falls in love with him which leads to something tragic.

programme.title: V.C. Andrews' Dark Angel
programme.desc: In her grandmother's fine, rich, Boston house, Heaven Casteel dreams of a wonderful new life of new friends, the best schools, clothes, and love.

programme.title: V.C. Andrews' Web of Dreams
programme.desc: Heaven's mother Leigh had to escape from Farthinggale Manor and the secrets she harboured. Falling into the arms of Luke Casteel Sr, his devotion promised her hope as only Luke knew her secrets.

programme.title: Burned By Love
programme.desc: A divorcee meets her seemingly perfect match on an online dating site, only to discover he's a scammer who's looking to destroy her life.

programme.title: It's Beginning to Look a Lot Like Murder
programme.desc: In the middle of preparing for her business' biggest season, Diana Hart learns she inherited an old house from her beloved aunt who was murdered.

programme.title: V.C Andrews' Ruby
programme.desc: In the heart of the bayou, Ruby Landry lives a simple, happy life. The only family Ruby has ever known are her loving guardian, Grandmere Catherine, and her drunken Grandpere Jack.

programme.title: Menendez: Blood Brothers
programme.desc: Erik and Lyle Menendez were educated, nice boys from sunny Beverly Hills, California. So when their parents were found shot dead in their home, no one could figure out why they did it.

programme.title: Envy: A Seven Deadly Sins Story
programme.desc: Gabrielle Flores has it all: a devoted husband, a beautiful daughter, and one of the best PR firms in the country.

programme.title: Secret Life of the Pastor's Wife
programme.desc: A pastor's wife seeks solace from her marital woes by having an affair with a pool boy. The fling quickly upsets the idyllic facade of the community, reigniting old jealousies.

programme.title: Queen of the Desert

programme.title: Colette
programme.desc: Set at the dawn of the modern age, this is the story of a woman who has been long denied her voice going to extraordinary lengths to reclaim it.

programme.title: Sea Fever
programme.desc: The crew of a West of Ireland trawler, marooned at sea, struggle for their lives against a growing parasite in their water supply.

programme.title: Madame Bovary
programme.desc: Trapped in a loveless marriage and eager for excitement, a doctor's wife seeks love and fulfilment outside the bonds of matrimony.

programme.title: Hope Gap
programme.desc: A couple's visit with their son takes a dramatic turn when the father tells him he plans on leaving his mother.

programme.title: Summerland

programme.title: Oranges and Sunshine
programme.desc: A powerful true story about a social worker who risks all in her effort to reunite families torn apart by a heartless government policy.

programme.title: Hyde Park on Hudson

programme.title: Slumber
programme.desc: Alice is a sleep doctor, haunted by the nocturnal death of her brother. While examining a family with sleep problems, she is forced to accept they're being terrorised by a demon.

programme.title: The Blacklist

programme.title: The Blacklist
