programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop III
programme.desc: For the third time, Detroit cop Axel Foley returns to Beverly Hills, this time to track down bad guys at an amusement park.

programme.title: Look Who's Talking Now
programme.desc: In this third film in the series, the Urbiaccos are going to the dogs. The canines must stop barking at each other to save the marriage of fun-loving parents James and Mollie.

programme.title: Legends of the Fall
programme.desc: When the sons of a cavalry colonel set out to fight a war in Europe, suspicion and jealousy threaten to tear apart their once indestructible bond when the sexy Susanna enters their lives.

programme.title: Waterworld
programme.desc: Earth is covered with water and the human race struggles to survive on dilapidated boats and makeshift floating cities.

programme.title: V.C. Andrews' Web of Dreams
programme.desc: Heaven's mother Leigh had to escape from Farthinggale Manor and the secrets she harboured. Falling into the arms of Luke Casteel Sr, his devotion promised her hope as only Luke knew her secrets.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Cari Farver
programme.desc: Based on actual events. When his girlfriend, Cari, starts sending him demanding messages Dave decides to break it off. Shortly after, Cari disappears and the police make a shocking discovery.

programme.title: My Child has My Doctor's Face
programme.desc: Jessica discovers that his biological father is actually her fertility doctor, she teams up with another one of the doctor's clients to bring him to justice.

programme.title: Vanished in Death Valley
programme.desc: A teenage girl goes missing after her family's car breaks down in Death Valley. Her parents soon find some unexpected help as they embark on a desperate search to find her.

programme.title: The Killing Game
programme.desc: Ten years after her daughter's murder, Eve is contacted by a man claiming to be the child's killer, who taunts her with mysterious clues and threats to kill again.

programme.title: Murdaugh Murders: Part 1
programme.desc: Alex Murdoch's family's hidden crimes begin piling up as he attempts to conceal his own financial felonies but falls into a dark spiral.

programme.title: One Night Stand Murder
programme.desc: Alyssa wakes up in a home that's not hers and discovers a dead body. With no memory of how she got there and no idea of who the body belongs to, Alyssa tries to piece together what happened.

programme.title: V.C Andrews' Pearl In The Mist
programme.desc: Fate whisked Ruby from a simple life in the Louisiana bayou. But her new riches bring more treachery than happiness.

programme.title: Road Trip Hostage
programme.desc: A deranged criminal forces a young woman to drive him across the country.

programme.title: Flowers in the Attic
programme.desc: After the death of their father, the four Dollanganger children are convinced by their mother to stay hidden in the attic of their grandparents' mansion so she can reclaim the family fortune.

programme.title: Single Black Female 3: The Final Chapter
programme.desc: Monica is proven innocent after being wrongfully arrested for murder. As charges are dropped, the police shift focus to Simone, who has vanished while bonding with her daughter Joy.

programme.title: Who Killed JonBenet?
programme.desc: Revisit the infamous murder of pint-sized beauty queen JonBenet Ramsey and the lurid details that captivated a nation.

programme.title: A Deadly Threat to My Family
programme.desc: Marielle becomes suspicious when her sister-in-law escapes from a cult and seeks refuge at her home. When another cult member shows up on her doorstep, she fears her daughter is their next target.

programme.title: Murdaugh Murders: Part 1
programme.desc: Alex Murdoch's family's hidden crimes begin piling up as he attempts to conceal his own financial felonies but falls into a dark spiral.

programme.title: One Night Stand Murder
programme.desc: Alyssa wakes up in a home that's not hers and discovers a dead body. With no memory of how she got there and no idea of who the body belongs to, Alyssa tries to piece together what happened.

programme.title: V.C Andrews' Pearl In The Mist
programme.desc: Fate whisked Ruby from a simple life in the Louisiana bayou. But her new riches bring more treachery than happiness.

programme.title: Road Trip Hostage
programme.desc: A deranged criminal forces a young woman to drive him across the country.

programme.title: Hope Gap
programme.desc: A couple's visit with their son takes a dramatic turn when the father tells him he plans on leaving his mother.

programme.title: Summerland
programme.desc: During World War II, an Englishwoman opens her heart to an evacuee after initially resolving to be rid of him in this moving journey of womanhood, love and friendship.

programme.title: Oranges and Sunshine
programme.desc: A powerful true story about a social worker who risks all in her effort to reunite families torn apart by a heartless government policy.

programme.title: Hyde Park on Hudson
programme.desc: Global affairs are juggled with the all-too-human side of one of history's iconic leaders Franklin D. Roosevelt as he hosts the English royals for an unforgettable weekend in upstate NY.

programme.title: Slumber
programme.desc: Alice is a sleep doctor, haunted by the nocturnal death of her brother. While examining a family with sleep problems, she is forced to accept they're being terrorised by a demon.

programme.title: In Bruges
programme.desc: After a job goes wrong, two hit men are ordered by their crime boss to cool their heels in Bruges. They don't make good tourists and soon find themselves in the oddest of circumstances.

programme.title: Vita and Virginia
programme.desc: In 1920's, London, Virginia Wolf meets fellow author Vita Sackville-West. Despite both of them being married, they embark on an affair that later inspires a novel.

programme.title: The Bookshop
programme.desc: Set in a small town in 1959 England, a woman decides, against polite but ruthless local opposition, to open a bookshop, a decision which becomes a political minefield.

programme.title: Route Irish
programme.desc: A security contractor in Iraq rejects the official explanation of his friend's death and decides to investigate.

programme.title: The Duke
programme.desc: In 1961, Kempton Bunton, a 60-year-old taxi driver, steals Goya's portrait of the Duke of Wellington from the National Gallery in London. What happened next became the stuff of legend.

programme.title: Film Stars Don't Die in Liverpool
programme.desc: A vibrant affair between a legendary femme fatale and her young lover quickly grows into a deep relationship. Their passion for life is tested by events beyond their control.

programme.title: Anna and the Apocalypse
programme.desc: T'was the night before Christmas, when a zombie apocalypse threatened a sleepy town. Anna and her friends must fight, slash, and sing their way to survival.

programme.title: In Bruges
programme.desc: After a job goes wrong, two hit men are ordered by their crime boss to cool their heels in Bruges. They don't make good tourists and soon find themselves in the oddest of circumstances.

programme.title: Vita and Virginia
programme.desc: In 1920's, London, Virginia Wolf meets fellow author Vita Sackville-West. Despite both of them being married, they embark on an affair that later inspires a novel.

programme.title: The Bookshop
programme.desc: Set in a small town in 1959 England, a woman decides, against polite but ruthless local opposition, to open a bookshop, a decision which becomes a political minefield.

programme.title: Love and Other Catastrophes
programme.desc: Mia and her friends struggle to find love, romance and a new roommate.

programme.title: Skippy
programme.desc: Sonny and his kangaroo Skippy live in Waratah National Park in New South Wales. Matt Hammond, Sonny's father is the park ranger. Skippy saves the day in many adventures.

programme.title: Heartbreak High
programme.desc: Jodie must choose between Nick and Rivers; Rose gives birth while on detention.

programme.title: The Rage in Placid Lake
programme.desc: This AFI winner puts a quirky spin on self-discovery when a lovable teen misfit decides to go straight after disastrously lifting the lid on his festering rage.

programme.title: Tim
programme.desc: Based on the 1974 novel by Colleen McCullough. A story of an unlikely romance between Tim, a 24-year-old intellectually impaired gardener and his employer, Mary, a gentle, older American woman.

programme.title: Heartbreak High
programme.desc: Jodie must choose between Nick and Rivers; Rose gives birth while on detention.

programme.title: Angel Baby
programme.desc: Harry, a schizophrenic patient, meets Kate at a psychiatric clinic, and they begin a passionate affair. Believing their love will heal them, they stop their medicines, but their world unravels.

programme.title: Two Hands
programme.desc: An aspiring hooligan loses $10,000 when he acts as a courier for a drug dealing gangster.

programme.title: The Man from Coxs River
programme.desc: Can a quest to save a mob of brumbies in inaccessible wilderness bring a fiercely independent horseman and a ranger enemy to see the world through each other's eyes?

programme.title: The History of Australian Surfing

programme.title: Heartbreak High

programme.title: Wills and Burke
programme.desc: A parody of the two 19th-century explorers who embarked on an ill-fated expedition across the Australian continent.

programme.title: Sirens
programme.desc: A repressed reverend falters when he tries to tame the wicked ways of an artist who does scandalous paintings of nude models.

programme.desc: Nick is seriously injured in a fight; Jodie learns her true feelings.

programme.title: The Adventures of Barry McKenzie
